Localization.Description: A user changed a system setting or registry key responsible for booting the system or starting a process, service, or driver in safe mode. This allows attackers to disable endpoint protection and avoid detection.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed the value of the key parameter of the registry branch responsible for the list of processes started in safe mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} executed a command to boot the system in safe mode with command prompt on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} executed a command to start a domain controller in restore mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} executed a command to boot the system in safe mode with networking on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} executed a command to boot the system in safe mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the value of the key parameter of the registry branch responsible for the list of processes started in safe mode with networking on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the registry value that enables the autorun of a process in safe mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} executed a command to boot the system with advanced boot options on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the registry value that enables the one-time autorun of a process in safe mode on host {event_src.host}
